items.title: Total Patients in Enclave
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients in the N3C Data Enclave
items.tooltipContent: Total Number of Individual Persons within the N3C Data Enclave.

items.title: Total Patients in View
items.tooltipContent:
Total Number of Individuals in the N3C Data Enclave within the view.

Sample: All N3C Patients.

Even without filters, this total may be less than the total number of patients within the Enclave due to the suppression of counts less than 20.

items.title: Non-Metformin in View
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients not taking Metformin in View
items.tooltipContent:
Total Number of Individuals within the view who do not have Metformin indicated in their EHR.

Sample: All N3C Patients.

items.title: Diabetic Non-Metformin in View
items.tooltipTitle: Diabetic Patients not taking Metformin in View
items.tooltipContent:
Total Number of Individuals within the view who have diabetes, but do not have Metformin, indicated in their EHR.

Sample: All N3C Patients.

items.title: Metformin in View
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients taking Metformin in View
items.tooltipContent:
Total Number of Individuals within the view who have Metformin indicated in their EHR.

Sample: All N3C Patients.

items.title: Diabetic Metformin in View
